sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: This Software Detailed Design describes the 'Full' group of VCU Engine Firmware, covering 6 unit(s) across 2 component(s). Interfaces, static structure and control-flow are derived from the Clang AST analysis.

children.title: Component Diagram
children.mermaid:
%%{init: {'flowchart': {'ranksep': '0.4', 'nodesep': '0.3'}}}%%
flowchart TB
  subgraph MOD["Iface"]
    U0["Flowcharts"]
    U1["PointRect"]
    U2["ReadWrite"]
    U3["Types"]
  end
  classDef unitNode fill:#2563eb,stroke:#1d4ed8,color:#ffffff
  class U0,U1,U2,U3 unitNode
  style MOD fill:#fef9c3,stroke:#fbbf24,color:#1e293b

children.title: Include Dependencies
children.mermaid:
%%{init: {'flowchart': {'ranksep': '0.5', 'nodesep': '0.35'}}}%%
flowchart BT
  N1["Flowcharts"]
  N2["Flowcharts
Header"]
  N3["PointRect"]
  N4["PointRect
Header"]
  N5["ReadWrite"]
  N6["ReadWrite
Header"]
  N7["Types"]
  N8["Types
Header"]
  N1 --> N2
  N3 --> N4
  N5 --> N6
  N7 --> N8
  classDef cppNode fill:#2563eb,stroke:#1d4ed8,color:#ffffff
  class N1,N3,N5,N7 cppNode
  classDef hNode fill:#1e293b,stroke:#334155,color:#ffffff
  class N2,N4,N6,N8 hNode
